---
title: "Marketing Spend Performance"
author: "YU-LIN CHUNG, 35480351"
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        theme: solar
    pdf:
        toc: true
---
```{r setup}
#| echo = FALSE
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    warning = FALSE)
```


# Introduction
```{r}

```

# Research Question
```{r}

```

# Dataset Introduction
```{r}

```

# Dataset Description
```{r}

```

# Results
```{r}

```
